app.title: Soroban Guard — Smart Contract Security Scanner
app.description: Automated vulnerability detection for Soroban smart contracts. Scan your Rust/Soroban code for security issues before deployment.

notFound.heading: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

code.largeWarning: Large contract — scan may be slow

github.hint: The repository must be public. The scanner will clone and analyze all .rs files.

contractId.hint: Enter a Soroban contract ID (C-address) deployed on Stellar. The scanner will fetch the WASM bytecode via Soroban RPC and analyze it.

ipfs.hint: Enter a CID (Qm… or bafy…) and click Fetch to load the contract source.
ipfs.errorInvalidCid: Invalid CID — must start with Qm… or bafy…

gist.hint: Paste a public Gist URL to fetch and scan its Rust source.

advanced.telegramHint: Results will be sent to your Telegram chat after a successful scan.
